init.template: Initialize the `.opencode/` project configuration in the current working directory by running the init script. Then review the generated files.
init.description: Initialize opencode project config with repo context

roc:plan-feature.template: Break down the feature into steps, identify impacted layers, and register risks and planned work in `.opencode/known_issues.md`.

roc:promote.template: Promote a tracked backlog item inside `known_issues.md`. Change `Status` from `backlog` or `ready` to `open`. Then create a remote issue via the create_issue script and start development on the generated branch.
roc:promote.description: Promote backlog item to open and create remote issue

roc:review-branch.template: Run a full PR/MR-style review: analyze `git diff`, use Senior Engineer reviewers, identify Critical and Major issues only, validate tests and docs, and register new issues.

roc:scan-issues.template: Run a deep analysis of the codebase to detect new issues (security, concurrency, architecture, reliability). Create or update `.opencode/known_issues.md`. Follow the issue entry format from `standards/issues.md`.
roc:scan-issues.description: Deep codebase analysis and issue detection
